recommendations.title: Prime
recommendations.overview: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

recommendations.title: Just a Question of Love
recommendations.overview: After his gay cousin dies from hepatitis, young Laurent, who lives with his best friend Carole, falls in love with Cedric, a plant scientist. He's afraid to inform his conservative parents that he is gay.

recommendations.title: Love Hurts
recommendations.overview: Family and friends try to sabotage the budding romance between a young upper class girl and a humble student.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: The Graduate
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned college graduate finds himself torn between his older lover and her daughter.

recommendations.title: Mad Love
recommendations.overview: An insane surgeon's obsession with an actress leads him to replace her wounded pianist husband's hands with those of a knife-throwing murderer.

recommendations.title: Materialists
recommendations.overview: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Universe
recommendations.overview: While waiting for a kidney transplant, a young pianist finds an unexpected connection with her doctor — and the courage to fulfill her musical dreams.

recommendations.title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
recommendations.overview: On an isolated island in Brittany at the end of the eighteenth century, a female painter is obliged to paint a wedding portrait of a young woman.

recommendations.title: West Side Story
recommendations.overview: In Manhattan’s Upper West Side, rival gangs of Polish-Americans and newly arrived Puerto Ricans clash for control of the neighborhood, even as two young members from opposite sides fall dangerously in love.
